LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS WARREN JACOBSON AND MONICA FLOECK'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 6. OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1, 2, 3, 4, 7, 8, 9, 11, 13 AND 14. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 5 TO STATE FACTS SHOWING UNCLEAN HANDS, AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 10, BECAUSE IT IS ADDRESSED TO CLAIMS THAT DO NOT REQUIRE EXHAUSTION, AND AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE 12, TO THE EXTENT IT IS ADDRESSED TO CLAIMS NOT BASED ON NEGLIGENCE. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Motion To Strike Defts First Amended Answer
Off Calendar Jan-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS WARREN JACOBSON and MONICA FLOECK'S Motion To Strike Defendants First Amended Answer is off calendar as re-noticed motions were set for January 3, 2007. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS WARREN JACOBSON and MONICA FLOECK'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as re-noticed motions were set for January 3, 2007. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

AMENDED DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS WARREN JACOBSON and MONICA FLOECK'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to affirmative defense 6. Overruled as to affirmative defenses 1, 2, 3, 4, 7, 8, 9, 11, 13 and 14. Sustained with leave to amend as to affirmative defense 5 to state facts showing unclean hands, as to affirmative defense 10, because it is addressed to claims that do not require exhaustion, and as to affirmative defense 12, to the extent it is addressed to claims not based on negligence. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion To Strike Defts' First Amended Answer
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS WARREN JACOBSON and MONICA FLOECK'S Motion To Strike Defendants' First Amended Answer is moot in light of ruling on demurrer. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. PLAINTIFFS WARREN JACOBSON and MONICA FLOECK'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as an amended answer was filed on November 14, 2006. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
